title: agrostis tremula
intro: Agrostis tremula, also known as trembling grass or wavy hair grass, is a type of grass species in the family Poaceae. The medicinal properties of Agrostis tremula include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Agrostis tremula is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
